UserAgent.name: send_social_recommendations
UserAgent.description: User agent selects newly published notes from content pool and pushes to its fans.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Dictionary of current notes published by the agent.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: List of fan IDs, used to find user agents to push notes to.

output_updates.name: recommendations
output_updates.description: Dictionary of note content pushed by social network.

UserAgent.name: receive_recommendation
UserAgent.description: User agent receives notes from social network and recommendation algorithms, and decides to comment on the notes or not.

required_variables.name: recommendations
required_variables.description: Dictionary of note content pushed by social network or recommendation algorithm.

required_variables.name: recommended_note_ids
required_variables.description: List of note IDs has been recommended.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: List of follow IDs, used to find user agents can be mentioned on the notes.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: List of fan IDs, used to find user agents can be mentioned on the notes.

required_variables.name: current_timestamp
required_variables.description: Current timestamp, used to generate comment ID.

required_variables.name: content_pool
required_variables.description: Available content pool containing all notes, used to get comments of the notes.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: Updated content pool containing newly generated comments.

UserAgent.name: handle_mention
UserAgent.description: User agent handles mention event, and decides to comment on the note or not.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: List of follow IDs, used to find user agents can be mentioned on the notes.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: List of fan IDs, used to find user agents can be mentioned on the notes.

required_variables.name: current_timestamp
required_variables.description: Current timestamp, used to generate comment ID.

required_variables.name: content_pool
required_variables.description: Available content pool containing all notes, used to get comments of the notes.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: Updated content pool containing newly generated comments.

RecommenderAgent.name: send_algorithm_recommendations
RecommenderAgent.description: Recommendation algorithm agent actively generates recommended content for all users.

required_variables.name: previous_notes
required_variables.description: Dictionary of previous notes published by the agent.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Dictionary of current notes published by the agent.

output_updates.name: recommendations
output_updates.description: Dictionary of note content pushed by recommendation algorithm.
